quizQuestion:
{___} llueve, nos quedamos en casa.
(If it rains, we'll stay at home.)
sentenceTranslation: If it rains, we'll stay at home.
explanation: si — Si llueve (condition: present indicative) → nos quedamos en casa (result: present or future). Type 1 si-clauses can also have the present indicative in the result (habit/general truth). Si + present → never subjunctive in type 1.
